form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when sixth (26.80) at Q Lakeside in a Grade 6. Will jump from box 1 for the first time. Key chance and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time when sixth (26.80) at Q Lakeside in a Grade 6. Will jump from box 1 for the first time. Key chance and should go close.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but prior to that was in the money twice in a row including a narrow loss at big odds two back when second (20.41) over 366m at this track. Aided by a low draw but prefer the place this line-up.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 0.8 lengths at Q Straight over 300m (16.67) beating Walloon Rocket in Maiden on March 16. Has hit winning form and is worth thought again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by 0.8 lengths at Q Straight over 300m (16.67) beating Walloon Rocket in Maiden on March 16. Has hit winning form and is worth thought again.

form.formComment: Came from wide draw and finished 6th in a Grade 6 on March 1 over 366m at this track behind Free Settler beaten 7 lengths (20.32). Needs to find a bit more to test these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Came from wide draw and finished 6th in a Grade 6 on March 1 over 366m at this track behind Free Settler beaten 7 lengths (20.32). Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 366m at this track. This looks too tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 366m at this track. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Last start finished last in a Grade 6 on April 4 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Mighty Shazam beaten 9 lengths (26.21). Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Got off the mark three back with her maiden win at this track. Placed following that before a last start sixth at this track. Has ability but will need the right run to feature here.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 300m at Q Straight beaten 6 lengths (17.26) behind Shadow Raven in a Grade 6 on April 6. Last couple have been below par. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at the last two runs, both at Q Straight, the latest when beaten 6 lengths behind Georgia Heat over 300m. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.
